# A T M Hasan

> AI researcher and senior software engineer in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, specializing in privacy-preserving RAG, document intelligence, Java, Spring Boot and microservices.

## Canonical profile

- [Portfolio](https://atmhasan.com/): Professional experience, research, projects, skills, education, publications, certifications and references.
- [Full machine-readable profile](https://atmhasan.com/llms-full.txt): Extended factual profile for AI systems.
- [Sitemap](https://atmhasan.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical public URLs.

## Primary roles

- AI Engineer
- AI Researcher
- Senior Software Engineer
- Java Software Engineer

## Research focus

- Privacy-preserving and multimodal retrieval-augmented generation for higher education
- Synthetic data, data minimization and on-premises knowledge stores
- OCR, document parsing, retrieval, re-ranking, grounding, guardrails and evaluation
